//: Shared TypeScript base configuration for Spaarke client surfaces (Code Pages, PCF, Office Add-ins, shared libs). Established by ai-spaarke-ai-workspace-UI-r1 brittleness remediation (2026-06-09) to centralize strict compiler settings across 20+ surfaces. Each surface extends this base and adds its own `jsx`, `baseUrl`, `paths`, `include`, `references`, and `typeRoots` as appropriate.
